name: Puppet Ritual
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>傀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－パペット・リチューアル
desc: If your opponent's Life Points are at least 2000 higher than yours: You can target 2 Level 8 "Gimmick Puppet" monsters in your Graveyard; Special Summon those targets. You can only activate 1 "Puppet Ritual" per turn. You cannot conduct your Battle Phase the turn you activate this card.
eff: If your opponent's Life Points are at least 2000 higher than yours: You can target 2 Level 8 "Gimmick Puppet" monsters in your Graveyard; Special Summon those targets. You can only activate 1 "Puppet Ritual" per turn. You cannot conduct your Battle Phase the turn you activate this card.
